3 = Part I, line 3 (c) 
4 = Part I, line 4 (d) 
5 = Part I, line 5 (e) 
6 = Part II 

Position 2: Sequence of condition within part/line Code range 1–7 

Position 3–6: Condition code (reference ICD-10 codes) whenever there is a 4-position code, there is 
always an implied decimal after the third position. 

Position 7: Nature of Injury flag 

0 = all other codes (always 0 for ICD-10 codes; 1999 forward)
